full_text:
Sun Zi (Yanlong) 孫資 (彥龍)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Zi (孫資), styledYanlong (彥龍), was born in Zhongdu county, Taiyuan commandery. Recommended Cao Shuang as Regent, advised policy of waiting against Shu and Wu. Sun Zi was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Sun Zi lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
